Therefore, `MAX_QUEUE_SIZE` is set to 10.\n\n5. **Sequential Logic Handling:** All queue management, data storage, and mismatch checking are placed inside `always @(posedge clk, negedge clk)` to ensure synchronization with the clock domain, fulfilling requirement 1.3.\n\n6. **Mismatch Reporting:** The system tracks total errors (`errors`) and individual signal errors (`errors_Y2`, `errors_Y4`) as per the original logic. \n\tassign Y4 = y[3]; \nendmodule\n\n// DUT Module (Placeholder - Must match interface derived from testbench usage)\nmodule TopModule (\n\tinput  logic [6:1] y,\n\tinput  logic w,\n\toutput logic Y2,\n\toutput logic Y4\n);\n\t// DUT implementation goes here\nendmodule\n\n// Improved Testbench\nmodule tb();\n\t// --- Statistics and Queue Definitions ---\n\t// State machine has 6 states, MAX_QUEUE_SIZE constrained to 10.\n\tlocalparam MAX_QUEUE_SIZE = 10;\n\n\t// Input Queue\n\treg [6:1] input_y_queue [$];\n\treg w_queue [$];\n\t\n\t// Golden Output Queue\n\treg Y2_ref_queue [$];\n\treg Y4_ref_queue [$];\n\t\n\t// DUT Output Queue\n\treg Y2_dut_queue [$];\n\treg Y4_dut_queue [$];\n\n\t// Mismatch tracking (Maintaining original logic structure)\n\treg errors = 0;\n\treg errortime = 0;\n\treg errors_Y2 = 0;\n\treg errortime_Y2 = 0;\n\treg errors_Y4 = 0;\n\treg errortime_Y4 = 0;\n\treg clocks = 0;\n\n\t// --- Signal Declarations ---\n\treg clk = 0;\n\t\n\tlogic [6:1] y_tb;\n\tlogic w_tb;\n\tlogic Y2_ref;\n\tlogic Y2_dut;\n\tlogic Y4_ref;\n\tlogic Y4_dut;\n\n\twire tb_match;\n\twire tb_mismatch = ~tb_match;\n\n\t// --- Clock Generation ---\n\tinitial forever\n\t\t#5 clk = ~clk;\n\n\t// --- Initialization and Dumping ---\n\tinitial begin \n\t\t$dumpfile(\"wave.vcd\");\n\t\t$dumpvars(1, tb.tb);\n\tend\n\n\t// --- Instantiations ---\n\tstimulus_gen stim1 (\n\t\t.clk, \n\t\ty_tb, \n\t\tw_tb, \n\t\t.tb_match\n\t);\n\tRefModule good1 (\n\t\ty_tb,\n\t\tw_tb,\n\t\t.Y2(Y2_ref),\n\t\t.Y4(Y4_ref) );\n\tTopModule top_module1 (\n\t\ty_tb,\n\t\tw_tb,\n\t\t.Y2(Y2_dut),\n\t\t.Y4(Y4_dut) );\n\n\t// --- Task for Time Step Synchronization (Kept as is per requirement 1) ---\n\tbit strobe = 0;\n\ttask wait_for_end_of_timestep;\n\t\trepeat(5) begin\n\t\tstrobe <= !strobe; Increment Clock Count\n\t\tclocks++;\n\n\t\t// 2. Store data in queues (FIFO behavior)\n\t\tif (input_y_queue.size() >= MAX_QUEUE_SIZE - 1) begin\n\t\t\tinput_y_queue.delete(0);\n\t\t\tw_queue.delete(0);\n\t\t\tY2_ref_queue.delete(0);\n\t\t\tY4_ref_queue.delete(0);\n\t\t\tY2_dut_queue.delete(0);\n\t\t\tY4_dut_queue.delete(0);\n\t\tend\n\n\t\t// Push current values\n\t\tinput_y_queue.push_back(y_tb);\n\t\tw_queue.push_back(w_tb);\n\t\tY2_ref_queue.push_back(Y2_ref);\n\t\tY4_ref_queue.push_back(Y4_ref);\n\t\tY2_dut_queue.push_back(Y2_dut);\n\t\tY4_dut_queue.push_back(Y4_dut);\n\n\t\t// 3. Check for Mismatches\n\t\tif (Y2_ref !== Y2_dut || Y4_ref !== Y4_dut) begin\n\t\t\t\n\t\t\t// Update total errors and time\n\t\t\tif (errors == 0) errortime = $time;\n\t\t\terrorrs++;\n\n\t\t\t// Y2 Mismatch Check\n\t\t\tif (Y2_ref !== Y2_dut) begin\n\t\t\t\tif (errors_Y2 == 0) errortime_Y2 = $time;\n\t\t\t\terrorrs_Y2 = errors_Y2 + 1'b1;\n\t\t\tend\n\t\t\t\n\t\t\t// Y4 Mismatch Check\n\t\t\tif (Y4_ref !== Y4_dut) begin\n\t\t\t\tif (errors_Y4 == 0) errortime_Y4 = $time;\n\t\t\t\terrorrs_Y4 = errors_Y4 + 1'b1;\n\t\t\tend\n\t\t\t\n\t\t\t// FIRST MISMATCH DISPLAY (Queue-based requirement)\n\t\t\tif (errors == 1) begin \n\t\t\t\t$display(\"\\n=====================================================\");\n\t\t\t\t$display(\"*** FIRST MISMATCH DETECTED AT TIME %0d ***",  
                "$time);\n\t\t\t\t$display(\"\\nLast %0d cycles of simulation (Mismatches found at cycle %0d):\n\", \n\t\t\t\tinput_y_queue.size(), clocks);\n\n\t\t\t\tfor (int i = 0; i < input_y_queue.size(); i++) begin\n\t\t\t\t\tif (Y2_ref_queue[i] !== Y2_dut_queue[i] || Y4_ref_queue[i] !== Y4_dut_queue[i]) begin\n\t\t\t\t\t$display(\"--- MISMATCH POINT FOUND AT INDEX %0d ---\", i);\n\t\t\t\t\t$display(\"Cycle %0d, Input y: %h (w: %b)\", i, input_y_queue[i], w_queue[i]);\n\t\t\t\t\t$display(\"Golden Output (Y2/Y4): %b/%b | DUT Output (Y2/Y4): %b/%b\", \n\t\t\t\t\tY2_ref_queue[i], Y4_ref_queue[i], Y2_dut_queue[i], Y4_dut_queue[i]);\n\t\t\t\t\tend\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tend\n\t\t\t\t$display(\"=====================================================\");\n\t\t\tend\n\t\tend\n\n\t// --- Simulation End Logic (Replaces final block) ---\n\tinitial begin\n\t\t// Wait for stimulus generator to finish or timeout\n\t\t@(posedge clk);\n\t\t#1000000; // Safety timeout from original TB\n\t\t\n\tif (errors == 0) begin\n\t\t\t$display(\"\\n*****************************************\");\n\t\t\t$display(\"SIMULATION PASSED\");\n\t\t\t$display(\"*****************************************\");\n\t\tend else begin\n\t\t\t$display(\"\\n*****************************************\");\n\t\t\t$display(\"SIMULATION FAILED - %0d MISMATCHES DETECTED, FIRST AT TIME %0d\", errors, errortime);\n\t\t\t$display(\"*****************************************\");\n\t\tend\n\t\t#1 $finish;\n\tend\n\n\t// Ensure simulation runs long enough to capture cycles if stimulus is slow\n\tinitial begin\n\t\twait(clocks > 1);\n\t\tend\n\nendmodule"
